user_system_path: Between rungs. The NEXT_SESSION_HARDENING mission (roadmap #420) shipped as four themed PRs (#426/#428/#430/#433). Since then: an owner-named seam greened the two frontend config-gate tests (PR #441), and the 4 low-risk dependabot bumps were merged (@supabase/supabase-js patch, autoprefixer, prettier, supabase CLI) with Stripe 18->22 (#437) deferred for breaking-change review. Owner-gated items remain: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + Slack/CRON env in Vercel Production, Supabase auth toggles (leaked-password/MFA), the paid Tier-1 selection layer, the Stripe major bump. Constraint: NO paid API calls — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Between rungs — only control-plane + docs may change until the owner names the next seam (which re-scopes this contract).
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/schema/deps changes without an active seam + scoped contract.
acceptance_condition: Control plane is consistent in the between-rungs form (build-order active_issue: none, contract active_issue: none, no active-seam line in ACTIVE_HANDOFF) and gate:continuity passes.
stop_condition: Stop when the control plane is rolled forward to a clean between-rungs state and the owner has the final scorecard.
next_command: New session: read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md; the owner names the next seam. The repo is hardened, the frontend config gates are green, and the 4 safe dependabot bumps are in. Standing items: the Stripe 18->22 major bump (#437) needs review; the owner-side unlock is setting ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in Vercel Production.
